response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general engineering capabilities and seniority, this role requires specialized expertise in embedded systems, security technologies, and low-level networking that is largely absent from the resume. Most critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is an explicit requirement and is not listed. The candidate's 15+ year career has focused primarily on web and backend development (TypeScript, Node.js, cloud systems) with only outdated embedded systems experience from 2016-2018. No security domain expertise, minimal networking knowledge, unclear current C proficiency, and no evidence of Linux kernel investigation or modification work.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience with demonstrated seniority in multiple staff/senior roles, exceeding the 3+ year requirement
Strong systems architecture and backend infrastructure experience, including microservices handling millions of requests and complex DevOps setups
Fluent English speaker with proven ability to work across international teams and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of security domain expertise; role explicitly requires knowledge of encryption, authentication systems, MACsec, and attack detection—none mentioned in resume
Native-level Japanese proficiency is a required qualification and is not listed; candidate indicates only English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and German (basic)

Career focused on web/backend development (TypeScript, Node.js, React); embedded systems work limited to 2016-2018 robotic projects; recent 5+ years show no firmware, kernel, or hardware-level development

key_factors.factor: No security domain expertise or track record
Limited embedded systems and Linux kernel experience; web/backend career focus
